form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last preparation second last of 8 at Flemington in the G3 Carbine Club November 1 over 1600m, 18 len behind Panova carrying 58kg at $51. Previously first up; fifth of 11 at Flemington in the LR Exford Plate September 13 over 1400m, 3 len behind Vinrock carrying 57.5kg at $31. Has ability, want to see a market push.

Drawn well and should take some catching.

form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of seven months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign won by neck Bunbury Mdn September 11 over 1400m slow track defeating So Much Serenity carrying 58kg at $1.70. Previously first up; sixth of 12 at Belmont Park Mdn August 27 over 1400m, soft track; 0.8 len behind Line Of Thought carrying 58kg at $3.30. Respecting with decent WA form.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start ran on from midfield and won by 4 len at this track Bm62 March 19 over 1400m in soft going defeating Blakmax with 57.5kg at $2.70. Before that eased back early on 4th of 8 at Sale Bm62 on March 1 over 1427m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Diamond Gust with 56kg at $4.80. Finds another nice race and is well placed to repeat the dose.
